media-scrubber._comment: Tokens for <OrigamMediaScrubber>. Reusable slider used by both the video scrubber AND the volume control inside <OrigamMediaController>. Track + buffer + progress + thumb + hover-tooltip surfaces.

track._comment: Idle track height. Slightly grows on hover/scrubbing via the --track-thickness-active companion var.

tooltip._comment: Floating hover tooltip used when showHoverTooltip=true. Horizontal orientation only. Uses neutral primitives directly because the DS has no semantic `surface.inverse` token yet — the contrast pair (neutral.900 bg + neutral.0 fg) matches what OrigamTooltip does elsewhere.
